name: 暗影双匕（★） | 渐变大理石
nameZh: 暗影双匕（★） | 渐变大理石
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated in three colors. The blade is made of many colors, but soon it all looks red
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了三层颜色的糖衣。 刺刀见虹，刺刀见红
